proposedSkills.name: Graphify
proposedSkills.description: Static analysis tool that extracts AST nodes and converts them into a navigable knowledge graph for LLM-native reasoning.

evidence.notes: Custom AST extraction engine implemented in Python.

proposedSkills.name: GitHub CLI
proposedSkills.description: Standard command-line interface for managing GitHub issues, pull requests, and repository lifecycle.

evidence.notes: Official tool used for issue automation.

proposedSkills.rationale: Essential for bridging agent findings with project management.

proposedSkills.name: Graphify Triage
proposedSkills.description: Automates architectural health checks by bridging Graphify analysis with GitHub issue management.

evidence.notes: Fuses structural analysis with PM automation.

proposedSkills.rationale: Fused skill combining graphify and github-cli. Automates the triage of architectural debt.
